doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: partial
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation is genuine, but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections appear to be fabricated additions not present in the actual BMJ publication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 75
REASON: The PRISMA 2020 statement is genuine (BMJ 2021, doi:10.1136/bmj.n71), but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors" sections appear fabricated or substantially embellished beyond the actual PRISMA guidance, which focuses on reporting standards rather than citation verification protocols.
